signals.signal: Brand confirmed churn on 2026-03-26 via Slack. Maddie stated they will not be moving forward with FERMAT on a long-term basis.
Platform activity dropped to near-zero after Mar 6. Zero sessions, revenue, and purchases in last 7 days. All funnel traffic ceased.
Brand Churn Notice email sent to churns@fermatcommerce.com on Mar 31. Opt-out date is Apr 22, 2026.
Billing discrepancy flagged: SFDC showed $3,000 MRR but actual contract was $1,500/month after January addendum. Invoices INV-0003063 and INV-0003155 paid on 2026-03-27.
Retention call held on Mar 31 with Maddie. Pulkit pitched $2,000/month month-to-month option and upcoming AI/branding features. Maddie confirmed cancellation of long-term commitment.
Account transitioned from Talia Cohen to Pulkit Srivastava on 2026-03-10. GM intro sent same day.
Slack channel staying open as soft re-engagement path. Month-to-month option still on the table post-Apr 22 cancellation.

recent.title: Mother Root x FERMAT (Retention Call)
recent.summary: Retention call with Maddie. She complained about UI/UX, desktop optimization, and branding limitations. Platform required more manual work than sales process suggested. Pulkit pitched $2,000/month month-to-month option and upcoming AI/branding features. Maddie confirmed cancellation of long-term commitment.

recent.title: Mother Root <> FERMAT | Weekly Check In
recent.summary: Maddie confirmed funnels finalized, deploying on Meta Monday. Plans to build Mother's Day funnel for UK market with bundled offer and slight discount. Talia to send bundle funnel examples.

recent.title: Mother Root <> FERMAT | Weekly Check In
recent.summary: Confirmed FERMAT vs Replo A/B test plan. Maddie showcased near-complete funnel build. Talia provided optimization feedback: add CTAs, remove view-on-site link, improve upsell presentation. Discussed font, sticky CTA, and button color customization limitations.

messages.author: Maddie / Tom (Mother Root)
messages.content: Churn notification: Will not be moving forward with Fermat on a long-term basis. Requested cancellation process details.

messages.author: Pulkit Srivastava (FERMAT)
messages.content: GM intro message to Mother Root team. Shared Calendly link for onboarding call.

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Account transition announcement: introducing Pulkit as new GM, Talia moving to Enterprise team.

messages.author: Mother Root
messages.content: Asked about Marmalade landing page - random orders appearing from unknown source.

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Confirmed traffic split was set to 0% FERMAT / 100% site by Maddie. Offered to adjust to 50/50.

messages.author: Mother Root
messages.content: Confirmed paid ads live using Fermat link. Asked if Mother's Day funnel was ready to go live.

messages.author: Mother Root
messages.content: Maddie going OOO for two weeks. Channel to be monitored.

messages.author: Mother Root
messages.content: Product MOTHERSDAYSET not appearing in Fermat after resync. Requested investigation.

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Check-in on first test status. Announced Module Visibility Controls feature launch based on Mother Root feedback.

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Desktop funnel changes, variant badge discussion, launch strategy options (device-based split vs mobile-first).

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Created TC Desktop | Replo Duplication funnel. Shared module configurations and label issue update.

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Post-call recap: fixed per-serve pricing, variant badges, cart design issues. Shared desktop landing page examples (OneSkin, 1906, JVN).

messages.author: Mother Root
messages.content: Technical support questions and Rhubarb Q1 launch dates: Mar 10 retention email, Mar 26 general launch via ads.

messages.author: Talia Cohen (FERMAT)
messages.content: Post-call follow-up: contract addendum shifting opt-out to 4/22, 90-Day Roadmap shared, target first two funnels by Jan 24.

key_issues: Traffic split set to 0% FERMAT by brand
GM transition from Talia to Pulkit happened just 16 days before churn notice

messages.subject: Re: Brand Churn Notice: MOTHER ROOT
messages.snippet: Noted on contracts being most reliable data source. Will reach out to MOTHER ROOT team to confirm March invoice status.

messages.subject: Re: Brand Churn Notice: MOTHER ROOT
messages.snippet: Contracts are the most reliable data sources. Can you confirm for the March invoice?

messages.subject: Re: Brand Churn Notice: MOTHER ROOT
messages.snippet: Understood on $3,000 MRR discrepancy. Saw this number on SFDC and have been following as source for all accounts.

messages.subject: Re: Brand Churn Notice: MOTHER ROOT
messages.snippet: Mother Root paid on 3/27 for INV-0003063 ($1,500 due 1/31) and INV-0003155 ($1,500 due 2/28). One outstanding: INV-0003298 - $1,500 due 3/31.

messages.subject: Re: Brand Churn Notice: MOTHER ROOT
messages.snippet: Mother Root team hasn't paid any invoices yet. Check up with them before churn.

messages.subject: Brand Churn Notice: MOTHER ROOT
messages.snippet: Formal churn notice submitted with customer details: Maddie Carey (Growth Marketing Manager), Thomas Beverley.

messages.subject: MOTHER ROOT x FERMAT || Next Steps
messages.snippet: Post-retention-call email draft. Appreciated Maddie's openness and honest feedback. Confirmed next steps.

granola.account_summary: UK-based brand on $1,500/month contract (reduced from $3,000 via January addendum). Opt-out date: April 22, 2026. Churned after platform frustration (UI/UX, desktop optimization, branding limitations). Slack channel remaining open as soft re-engagement path. Month-to-month option ($2,000/month) still available post-cancellation.
